name: Fried Curried Rice (Khao Pad Pong Kari)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok or frying pan/skillet, heat the oil until a light haze appears.
2. Add the garlic and fry until golden brown.
3. Add the boiled rice, stir once.
4. Add all the remaining ingredients and stir until thoroughly mixed.
5. Turn off the heat and transfer to a serving dish.
6. Garnish with cucumber rounds and coriander leaves.
